case_title: OPORTUN INC. VS. PASTOR GONZALEZ LUGO

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUL-13-2016 - CONTINUED FOR PROGRESS REPORT TO NOV-16-2016 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT. 506. APPEARANCES BY PLAINTIFF'S REPRESENTATIVE DONNA FLORES ALBERTO, LEGAL COLLECTIONS SPECIALIST FOR OPORTUN INC., AND DEFENDANT PASTOR GONZALEZ LUGO. PROOF OF SERVICE IN THE FILE. EXHIBITS NOT RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: K. DOUGHERTY. NOT REPORTED. (D506).

THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE, AT THE REQUEST OF THE PLAINTIFF. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF OPORTUN INC'S REPRESENTATIVE: MARLEN RAMOS. NO APPEARANCE BY DEFENDANT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: S. LE. NOT REPORTED. (506)
REMARK: RETURNED MAIL: SMALL CLAIMS ORDER OF DISMISSAL MAILED TO DEFENDANT ON 11/16/16. PER U.S. POSTAL SERVICE, "REFUSED-UNABLE TO FORWARD."
